scripts.build: mkdir -p data && DATABASE_URL=file:./data/thedailyhaiku.db npx drizzle-kit push --force && next build
scripts.start: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');process.env.DATABASE_URL='file:./data/thedailyhaiku.db';try{execSync('npx drizzle-kit push --force',{stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){console.error('DB push failed:',e.message)};try{execSync('npx tsx src/seed.ts',{stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){console.error('Seed failed:',e.message)};execSync('next start',{stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.setup: DATABASE_URL=file:./data/thedailyhaiku.db npx drizzle-kit push && DATABASE_URL=file:./data/thedailyhaiku.db npx tsx src/seed.ts
